title: WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS PUBLIC HEALTH WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health program designed to improve health outcomes and influence lifetime nutrition and health behaviors for women, infants, and children. Nutrition education classes are provided as part of the program; other services include breastfeeding support, monthly benefits for supplemental nutritious foods, and referrals to community resources. 2111 8th Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Applicants must meet four criteria to be eligible for WIC: -Live in Oregon (US citizenship is not required) -Be a pregnant, postpartum, or breastfeeding woman, or an infant or child under age 5. Fathers, foster parents, and other guardians can also apply on behalf of a qualifying child. -Have a household income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL). Families receiving OHP, SNAP, or TANF are automatically income-eligible for WIC. -Have a nutritional risk (assessed at time of appointment) Hours: Varies by location (503) 842-3943 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-3943 FAX (503) 842-3983 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of ID for parent/guardian and child, proof of address, and proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at 8th Street and Pacific Avenue Services: WIC Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - FOOD HANDLER CARD ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - WATER QUALITY ASSURANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH FACILITY HEALTH INSPECTIONS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION AND SYRINGE SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - NALOXBOX If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
